name: Professor Elijah Miner
description: Provides overall medical leadership and oversees clinical standards, patient care, and strategic medical direction of the hospital. He is also the Chief Surgeon.

name: Dr Simon Tada
description: Oversees hospital administration and coordinates transplant programs to ensure efficient and well-organized patient services.

name: DNS Treasure Obi
description: Leads the nursing department, ensuring high standards of patient care and professional nursing practice across all units.

name: Mrs. Joy Emeh
description: Manages human resources, including staff recruitment, development, and welfare to support a productive hospital workforce.

name: Dr. Zechariah F. Sunday
description: Specializes in the diagnosis and management of kidney diseases and supervises dialysis and renal care services.

name: Mr Jimmy Olushegun Balogun
description: Manages staff development, recruitment, and employee welfare while supporting a productive hospital workforce.

name: Nnedinma Hezekiah
description: Supervises nursing operations in the dialysis unit and ensures quality patient care for individuals receiving renal treatment.

name: Patience Mnena Ulaka
description: Leads the customer service team to ensure patients and visitors receive prompt assistance and a positive hospital experience.

name: MLS Amina Saheed
description: Oversees laboratory diagnostics and ensures accurate and timely testing services that support medical decision-making.

name: Pharm Nafisa Haruna
description: Supervises medication management, pharmaceutical services, and ensures safe dispensing of drugs to patients.

name: Mr Nwakanma Hezekiah
description: Ensures all hospital facilities, equipment, and infrastructure are properly maintained for safe and efficient operations.

name: Eniola Seun Olumoko
description: Manages hospital inventory, medical supplies, and logistics to ensure essential materials are always available.

name: Mr Yakubu Ayuba
description: Oversees financial planning, budgeting, and resource management to support the hospital’s sustainability and growth.

name: Ukpai Godwin Umedike
description: Provides administrative support and coordination to ensure smooth communication and office operations.

name: Mr Elisha Ayuba Abare
description: Handles procurement processes, sourcing of medical equipment, and supply chain coordination.

name: Ishaku Ayuba Abare
description: Oversees facility operations and ensures the hospital environment remains safe, functional, and well managed.

name: Mr Williams Dasat
description: Leads security operations to ensure the safety of patients, staff, visitors, and hospital property.

name: Mrs Courage Macaulay
description: Focuses on patient feedback, service improvement, and ensuring high levels of client satisfaction across the hospital.
